metadata.description: Wire format for `vibe uninstall --json`. Source of truth for `crates/vibe-wire/src/generated/uninstall_report.rs`.
`<kind>:<name>` of the package that was removed.
Forward-slash-normalised paths of every file removed. User-owned paths (e.g. `spec/boot/00-core.md`, `spec/boot/90-user.md`, `spec/WAL.md`) are filtered out at plan-time and never appear here.
